chunks.text:
Texas Sage Landscaping & Lawn — Lawn care and landscaping service in Dallas. Services:
- Lawn maintenance
- Landscaping
- Tree trimming
- Garden care
- Seasonal cleanup

Contact Information:
- Phone: (469) 277-7252
- Email: david. yu@txsagelandscaping. com
- Address: 18383 Preston Rd #202, Dallas, TX 75252
- Website: http://txsagelandscaping. com/
- Service Area: Dallas, TX and surrounding areas

Rating: 5 stars with 20 reviews.
